description: A nanosystems engineer has imaged a nanostructured surface using an automated microscope, resulting in a 3x3 grid of overlapping tiles. Your task is to stitch these 9 tiles into a single seamless panoramic image using Fiji's 'Grid/Collection Stitching' plugin. The tiles are located in `~/Fiji_Data/raw/tiles/` named `tile_1.tif` through `tile_9.tif`. Use the grid layout parameters (3x3, Right & Down, ~15% overlap) found in `~/Fiji_Data/raw/tiles/grid_info.txt`. Save the fused result as a TIFF file to `~/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/stitched_panorama.tif` and a PNG copy to `~/Fiji_Data/results/stitched/stitched_panorama.png`.
